caption: The video shows a static graphic on a gradient blue and white background. Centered in the frame is a professional logo consisting of the text "TFNN.com" in a bold, dark blue sans-serif font. Directly beneath this, a smaller tagline reads "EDUCATING INVESTORS" in all-capital letters, also in dark blue. There are no people, movement, or changes in scenery across the frames. The composition remains completely identical from start to finish, presenting a steady, unmoving image of the corporate branding against the soft blue-to-white vertical gradient.
